Hero.homeDescription: I build modern web applications with a focus on clean UI and usability. I enjoy turning ideas into functional, user-friendly digital products.

About.title: About me
About.subtitle: My introduction
About.description: I am a Software Engineering Student at the {hva} in the HBO-ICT program. During my internship at {altura}, I worked as a Frontend Developer. There, I was involved in developing new features, fixing bugs, and improving the user experience. During my internship research, I investigated how error handling in the frontend of the application could be improved, with a focus on usability and clear feedback for users. I enjoy creating user-friendly interfaces and combining technology with UI/UX.
